root.sql: SELECT to_snumber(((CASE sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.sign_flag WHEN 1 THEN sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance ELSE null END))::bigint) as deposit_amount , to_snumber(((CASE sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.sign_flag WHEN -1 THEN sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance ELSE null END))::bigint) as withdraw_amount , sc_dep_m_creditor_item.total_balance , sc_dep_m_creditor_item.working_day , sc_cnt_m_month.month_no , sc_cnt_m_month.month_name_thai , '!working_year!' + 543 as working_year , sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code , sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name , current_date FROM sc_dep_m_creditor_item , sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type , sc_dep_m_creditor , sc_dep_m_rule , sc_cnt_m_month WHERE sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type = sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.deposit_item_type and sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no and sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code and sc_cnt_m_month.month_no = extract(month from sc_dep_m_creditor_item.working_day) and extract(year from sc_dep_m_creditor_item.working_day) = '!working_year!' /*WHERE*/
